features.name: Cantrips
features.description: At 1st level, you know two cantrips of your choice from the druid spell list.

features.name: Beast Shape
features.description: Starting at 2nd level, you can use your action to magically assume the shape of a beast that you have seen before.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: At 8th level, you can use your action to transform into any beast whose challenge rating is 1 or lower, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a short or long rest.
